rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
generic_rules: Preserve the original AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in valid component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in valid implementation scopes
Use only visible identifiers from the current scope when writing AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
